content: Better Auth 2FA TOTP plugin: server uses twoFactor() plugin with appName as issuer; client uses twoFactorClient({twoFactorPage}). Schema adds twoFactorEnabled bool on users + new twoFactor table (id, userId, secret, backupCodes, verified). Client API: enable(), disable(), getTotpUri(), verifyTotp(), generateBackupCodes(), verifyBackupCode(), viewBackupCodes(). Backup codes: configurable amount/length, single-use. twoFactorRedirect:true triggers 2FA challenge on sign-in. allowPasswordless:true for OAuth-only users. skipVerificationOnEnable available. TOTP accepts ±1 window. Trusted devices last 30 days.
